fields.description: Check this if this reason should be available on the assessment level (e.g., plagiarism). It will make course enrollment and assessment required on the incident page.

fields.description: Advisory progressive-discipline matrix: recommended action(s) by occurrence number. These pre-fill the incident's applied actions; the adjudicator confirms or overrides. Nothing is auto-enforced except an action flagged 'Triggers Program Dismissal'.
